<!--
Thanks for contributing to code-sandbox!

Before opening this PR, please skim CONTRIBUTING.md for our
conventions. Keep PRs small and focused; one feature or fix per PR
is ideal.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what changed and why. -->

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Refs #456". -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` -- new user-visible capability
- [ ] `fix` -- correction of a bug
- [ ] `security` -- guardrail fix or escape vector mitigation
- [ ] `docs` -- documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` -- code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `test` -- adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` -- build, CI, deploy, or tooling change

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Unit tests, integration tests,
     manual runs, etc. Paste relevant output where useful. -->

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior (where applicable)
- [ ] For security fixes: added escape vector test proving the bypass is now blocked
